function.name: scheduleConsultation
function.description: Schedule a consultation callback with a customer service representative for a customer who needs detailed assistance

contact_number.description: Phone number to call the customer back

preferred_datetime.description: Preferred date and time for the callback (e.g., 'tomorrow at 2 PM', '2024-03-15 14:00')

topic.description: Topic or issue the customer wants to discuss in the consultation

function.name: resetPassword
function.description: Send a password reset link to the customer's registered email address for their online account

account_email.description: The email address associated with the customer's account

customer_name.description: Full name of the account holder for verification

function.name: payInvoice
function.description: Process a payment for a customer's invoice or outstanding bill

invoice_number.description: The invoice or bill number provided by the customer

payment_method.description: Payment method the customer wants to use

amount.description: Amount to pay. Omit to pay the full invoice balance.

function.name: updatePersonalInformation
function.description: Update a customer's personal information stored in their account

account_email.description: Email address of the account to update

new_value.description: The new value to set for the specified field

function.name: trackOrder
function.description: Look up the current status and location of a customer's order or shipment

order_number.description: The order or tracking number provided by the customer

customer_name.description: Full name of the customer for verification

function.name: submitComplaint
function.description: Submit a formal complaint or report an issue on behalf of a customer

customer_name.description: Full name of the customer submitting the complaint

contact_email.description: Email address to send the complaint confirmation to

description.description: Detailed description of the complaint or issue

function.name: checkAccountStatus
function.description: Retrieve a customer's account status, plan details, or current balance

account_email.description: Email address associated with the customer's account

info_type.description: Type of account information to retrieve

function.name: requestRefund
function.description: Submit a refund request for a customer's purchase or payment

customer_name.description: Full name of the customer requesting the refund

order_or_invoice_number.description: The order or invoice number for which the refund is requested

function.name: transferToDepartment
function.description: Transfer the current customer to another department or specialist team

department.description: The department or team to transfer the customer to

customer_name.description: Full name of the customer being transferred

function.name: lookupServiceInfo
function.description: Look up information about available products, services, plans, or policies

query.description: The product, service, plan, or policy the customer is asking about

category.description: Category of information to look up
